events.title: Student Graduation
events.description: Celebrate our your loved one's dance accomplishments and enjoy some social dancing with all of our graduates!

events.title: Classic Animation Showcase
events.description: Enjoy watching our students perform to music from classic animated shows and movies!

events.title: Peabody Intensive
events.description: Learn to dance the Peabody with confidence while having fun!

events.title: Cinco de Mayo Dance Party
events.description: Join us for our Latin Development class at 8 PM and stay for a fun Cinco de Mayo Dance Party right after!
